chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 227 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.7555/2023 (C/A) 15.08.2024 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Abdul Razzaq, Chairman, Market Committee, Daharki and Jam Mehrab, Secretary, Market Committee, Daharki..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A statement has been filed, taken on record, in terms of which the Chairman and Secretary of Market Committee, Daharki have undertaken to pay monthly pension regularly to the petitioner up to 15th of every month, and with regards arrears of pension, he would be paid Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) per month also till his entire arrears are satisfied. The petitioner, who has also countersigned the aforesaid statement, states that such an arrangement is acceptable to him. In these circumstances, the contempt application is disposed of with the above provision and undertaking; however, with the direction that the undertaking having been given to this Court should be complied without any further inference sought from this Court. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
